## Pattern

<!-- The regex pattern (JavaScript syntax) -->

```js

```

## Suggested Weight

<!-- 15-22 for ambiguous signals, 28-40 for strong signals -->

## Examples That SHOULD Match (5+ required)

```
1.
2.
3.
4.
5.
```

## Examples That Should NOT Match (5+ required)

<!-- Benign text that looks similar but isn't an attack -->

```
1.
2.
3.
4.
5.
```
